sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95697" key="spaqi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπᾰθ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ] οἶνος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n95697.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">palm</tr_>-wine, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
